text: 🔄 Forwarded from Press TV: 🔺 Press TV Exclusive: US destroyers' Strait of Hormuz transit stunt failed, came close to destruction The US military’s attempt to sail two destroyers through the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday ended as a failed propaganda stunt timed to coincide with talks in Islamabad, a Press TV investigation has found. @PressTV
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Press TV: 🔺 Press TV 独家：美国驱逐舰穿越霍尔木兹海峡的噱头失败，险些被摧毁。Press TV 的调查发现，美国军方周六试图派遣两艘驱逐舰穿越霍尔木兹海峡的行动，是一场为了配合伊斯兰堡会谈而精心策划的失败的宣传噱头。 @PressTV

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it has killed an alleged Hezbollah fighter who was allegedly involved in the death of Staff Sergeant Touvel Yosef Lifshiz in southern Lebanon last week. During an initial exchange of fire on Tuesday, Lifshiz and one Hezbollah member were killed. Two days later, troops returned to the site, found a second Hezbollah fighter hiding under the rubble and then killed him at close range. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方称，他们击毙了一名据称参与了上周在黎巴嫩南部导致图维尔·约瑟夫·利夫希茨（Touvel Yosef Lifshiz）上士死亡事件的真主党武装人员。在周二的初步交火中，利夫希茨和一名真主党成员丧生。两天后，部队返回现场，发现第二名真主党武装人员躲在废墟下，随后在近距离将其击毙。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇷🇺🇮🇷 Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Masoud Pezeshkian, according to the Kremlin. Pezeshkian congratulated Putin and Orthodox Christians in Russia on Easter. He also commented on the Iran–U.S. talks held on April 11 in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics…" 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Masoud Pezeshkian thanked Vladimir Putin for Russia’s humanitarian assistance to the Iranian people, as well as for Moscow’s principled stance, including on international platforms, aimed at de-escalating the situation, the Kremlin said. Putin and Pezeshkian also reaffirmed their mutual commitment to further strengthening comprehensive, good-neighborly relations between Russia and Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics: “🇷🇺🇮🇷 据克里姆林宫消息，弗拉基米尔·普京与马苏德·佩泽希齐扬进行了通话。佩泽希齐扬向普京及俄罗斯的东正教徒祝贺复活节。他还就4月11日在伊斯兰堡举行的伊美会谈发表了评论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics…” 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫表示，马苏德·佩泽希齐扬感谢弗拉基米尔·普京对伊朗人民提供的人道主义援助，以及莫斯科在包括国际平台在内的场合所持的旨在缓和局势的原则立场。普京和佩泽希齐扬还重申了双方致力于进一步加强俄伊全面睦邻友好关系的共同承诺。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Masoud Pezeshkian, according to the Kremlin. Pezeshkian congratulated Putin and Orthodox Christians in Russia on Easter. He also commented on the Iran–U.S. talks held on April 11 in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 据克里姆林宫消息，弗拉基米尔·普京与马苏德·佩泽希齐扬进行了通话。佩泽希齐扬向普京及俄罗斯的东正教徒祝贺复活节。他还就4月11日在伊斯兰堡举行的伊美会谈发表了评论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: “⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部两个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Channel 15 in Hebrew: The Chief of Staff has directed the Israeli army to an immediate state of alert in preparation for war with Iran. A decision on resuming the bombing has not yet been made.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 希伯来语第15频道：参谋长已指示以色列军队进入即时戒备状态，为与伊朗的战争做准备。目前尚未做出恢复轰炸的决定。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ Péter Magyar said record turnout is expected in today’s elections. 📌 “It is crucial that every citizen comes out to vote, and just as important to encourage friends, relatives, and others to do the same.” 📌 “Today, millions of us are writing Hungary’s history together. At every election — for victory! God bless you all, and God bless Hungary!” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ 彼得·马贾尔（Péter Magyar）表示，预计今天的选举投票率将创下历史新高。📌 “至关重要的是，每一位公民都要出来投票，同样重要的是鼓励亲友和其他人也这样做。” 📌 “今天，我们数百万人在共同书写匈牙利的历史。在每一次选举中——为了胜利！上帝保佑你们所有人，上帝保佑匈牙利！” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @JenniferJJacobs : None of the US delegation stayed behind in Pakistan after Iran talks. Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff and the technical team departed Islamabad, officials told CBS News. VP Vance landed at Ramstein Air Base in Germany just before 7 a.m. ET. https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-strait-of-hormuz-israel-ceasefire-talks/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) RT @JenniferJJacobs : 伊朗会谈后，没有美国代表团成员留在巴基斯坦。官员告诉哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）新闻，贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）、史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和技术团队已离开伊斯兰堡。万斯副总统于美国东部时间上午7点前降落在德国拉姆施泰因空军基地。 https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-strait-of-hormuz-israel-ceasefire-talks/ 推文

text: ELINT News RT @Ahmed_Rasheed_R : April 11 (Reuters) - U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems to Iran within the next few weeks, CNN reported late on Friday, citing three people familiar with recent intelligence assessments. #Iran #China #USA tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @Ahmed_Rasheed_R : 4月11日（路透社）- 据CNN周五晚间援引三位熟悉近期情报评估的人士的话报道，美国情报显示中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付新的防空系统。 #伊朗 #中国 #美国 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @nikitabier : All aggregators had their payouts reduced to 60% this cycle. We will add another 20% deduction in the next cycle. It became abundantly clear: flooding the timeline with 100 stolen reposts and clickbait everyday crowded-out real creators and hurt new author growth. The next step is to assign a permanent deduction to habitual bait posters who use “ 🚨 BREAKING”on every post. X will never infringe on speech or reach—but we will not compensate for manipulation of the program or our users. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) RT @nikitabier : 本周期所有聚合器的支付比例均降至60%。我们将在下一个周期再扣除20%。情况已经非常清楚：每天用100条窃取的转发和点击诱饵充斥时间线，挤占了真实创作者的空间，并损害了新作者的成长。下一步是对那些在每篇帖子中都使用“🚨突发新闻”的习惯性诱饵发布者进行永久扣除。X永远不会侵犯言论或触达率，但我们不会为操纵该计划或我们用户的行为提供补偿。推文

text: WarTranslated Turnout in Hungary’s parliamentary elections hit 54.14 percent by 1 PM, or 4,075,272 voters, already above the 3 PM 2022 figure of 52.8 percent. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 匈牙利议会选举投票率截至下午1点已达54.14%，即4,075,272名选民，已超过2022年下午3点52.8%的数字。推文

text: OSINTdefender Signs for the trilateral U.S.-Pakistan-Iran ceasefire talks are already coming down today, following the failure to reach an agreement. A swift end. https://twitter.com/leventkemaI/status/2043181458311803206/video/1 - Levent Kemal tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 由于未能达成协议，美巴伊三方停火谈判的迹象今天已经消失。结束得很快。 https://twitter.com/leventkemaI/status/2043181458311803206/video/1 - Levent Kemal 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to CBS, the entire U.S. negotiating team, from principal decision-makers down to the technical team, left Islamabad, Pakistan, despite Pakistani media saying that Pakistani mediators are still working to achieve points of convergence between Iran and the United States. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043294598986957114/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据CBS报道，整个美国谈判团队，从主要决策者到技术团队，均已离开巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，尽管巴基斯坦媒体称巴基斯坦调解人仍在努力寻求伊朗和美国之间的共识点。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043294598986957114/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : Tucker Carlson said he feels sorry for Trump, describing him as not free in this moment. ▪️ He added that Trump announced a ceasefire with relief, but it collapsed within two hours after Israel allegedly violated the terms by striking Beirut. https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043294143766544526/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）表示他为特朗普感到难过，称他此刻并不自由。▪️ 他补充说，特朗普如释重负地宣布了停火，但由于以色列据称违反条款轰炸贝鲁特，停火在两小时内就崩溃了。 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043294143766544526/video/1 推文

text: 🇿🇦 ⚡️ Elon Musk's Starlink Tantrum: Accuses South Africa of denying Starlink license because he is not BLACK
text_zh: 🇿🇦 ⚡️ 埃隆·马斯克的星链（Starlink）闹剧：指责南非拒绝星链许可证是因为他不是黑人

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Resistance Committees in Palestine issued two statements: They condemned the Zionist bombing of a police point at the entrance to Al-Bureij camp as a continuation of fascist war crimes aimed at spreading chaos, holding the US administration fully responsible for the catastrophic situation, and calling on mediators to impose an end to Zionist violations. They also condemned the storming of Al-Aqsa Mosque by extremist minister Ben Gvir as an attempt to impose temporal and spatial division and Judaization, affirming that Al-Aqsa will remain the title of the struggle, calling on Palestinians to flock to the mosque to protect it from Zionist defilement.
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 巴勒斯坦抵抗委员会发表了两份声明：他们谴责犹太复国主义者轰炸布雷吉（Al-Bureij）难民营入口处的警察哨所，称这是旨在散布混乱的法西斯战争罪行的延续，认为美国政府应对灾难性局势负全部责任，并呼吁调解人强制结束犹太复国主义者的违规行为。他们还谴责极端主义部长本·格维尔（Ben Gvir）闯入阿克萨清真寺，称这是试图强加时空分割和犹太化，重申阿克萨清真寺将永远是斗争的象征，呼吁巴勒斯坦人涌向清真寺以保护其免受犹太复国主义者的亵渎。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Both the US and Iranian delegations have left Islamabad in the immediate aftermath of the failed talks. The U.S. delegation’s government aircraft (N471US) departed overnight and has now landed in Paris. Neither side wanted to stay another day, which is why talks continued into the night. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 在谈判失败后，美国和伊朗代表团均已离开伊斯兰堡。美国代表团的政府飞机（N471US）连夜起飞，现已降落在巴黎。双方都不想再多待一天，这就是谈判持续到深夜的原因。 @wfwitness

text: Kremlin: Territorial disagreements between Russia and Ukraine amount to “just a few kilometers.”
text_zh: 克里姆林宫：俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的领土分歧仅为“几公里”。

text: Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff did not stay in Islamabad. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 贾里德·库什纳和史蒂夫·威特科夫没有留在伊斯兰堡。来源：路透社

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部两个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇻🇦 The Chaldean Catholic Church has elected Archbishop Emil Nona as its new patriarch. He has chosen the name Mar Paul Nona III. The 58‑year‑old led the Chaldean Archdiocese of Mosul before the rise of ISIS in 2014, and later served as head of the diocese of Sydney, Australia. His election follows the resignation of Cardinal Louis Raphael Sako. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇻🇦 加尔底亚礼天主教会选举埃米尔·诺纳（Emil Nona）大主教为新任宗主教。他选择了马尔·保罗·诺纳三世（Mar Paul Nona III）这个名字。这位58岁的大主教在2014年ISIS崛起前曾领导摩苏尔的加尔底亚礼总教区，后来担任澳大利亚悉尼教区负责人。他的当选是在路易斯·拉斐尔·萨科（Louis Raphael Sako）枢机主教辞职后进行的。 @wfwitness

text: The Israeli army is on immediate alert over the possibility of a return to war with Iran. Source: ynet
text_zh: 以色列军队因可能重返与伊朗的战争而处于即时戒备状态。来源：ynet

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed a series of attacks on Sunday in response to alleged Israeli ceasefire violations. Targets included a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Yaron with drones at 07:10, two barrages on Israeli vehicles and troops in Khiam at 05:15 and 05:30, a command vehicle in Taybeh with a drone at 09:45, the Kiryat Shmona barracks with drones at 11:10, an Israeli military gathering at Tel Hamams south of Khiam with rockets at 13:00, the battalion command headquarters in Beit Hillel with rockets at 13:30, and multiple gatherings near Shmaran hill in Bint Jbeil with rocket barrages at 07:30 and 09:30. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党周日声称发动了一系列袭击，以回应以色列所谓的停火违规行为。目标包括：07:10用无人机袭击亚伦（Yaron）的以色列士兵集结地；05:15和05:30对希亚姆（Khiam）的以色列车辆和部队进行两次弹幕射击；09:45用无人机袭击泰贝（Taybeh）的一辆指挥车；11:10用无人机袭击基里亚特什莫纳军营；13:00用火箭弹袭击希亚姆以南Tel Hamams的以色列军事集结地；13:30用火箭弹袭击拜特希勒尔（Beit Hillel）的营指挥部；以及07:30和09:30用火箭弹袭击宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）Shmaran山附近的多处集结地。 @wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: All American presidents since 1963 have done substantially what Israel wanted us to do, and now it is really hurting us. The problem is not simply Trump; the problem is the mechanism of control that allows a country of 9 million to control a country of 365 million. What is that mechanism? I am not sure I know the answer. We need to find out.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：自1963年以来的所有美国总统基本上都做了以色列想让我们做的事，现在这真的伤害了我们。问题不仅仅是特朗普；问题在于控制机制，它允许一个900万人口的国家控制一个3.65亿人口的国家。那个机制是什么？我不确定我知道答案。我们需要找出答案。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱🇦🇪 Kan: A Syrian security official stated that the foiling of a Hezbollah‑linked cell that allegedly planned to target a Jewish figure in Damascus shows the government’s commitment to protecting the Jewish community. The official added that…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Hezbollah denied “false and fabricated” allegations by the Syrian interior ministry linking the group to a cell planning to assassinate a religious figure in Syria. The group reaffirmed it has no activity, ties or presence on Syrian territory, and called on Syrian authorities to verify information before making accusations, especially as intelligence agencies seek to stir tension between Lebanon and Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: “⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱🇦🇪 Kan：一位叙利亚安全官员表示，挫败一个据称计划在大马士革针对犹太人物的真主党相关小组，显示了政府保护犹太社区的承诺。该官员补充说……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 真主党否认了叙利亚内政部关于该组织与一个计划暗杀叙利亚宗教人物的小组有关联的“虚假和捏造”指控。该组织重申其在叙利亚领土上没有任何活动、联系或存在，并呼吁叙利亚当局在做出指控前核实信息，特别是在情报机构试图挑起黎巴嫩和叙利亚之间紧张关系的情况下。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has urged Iran and the United States to “find a way through” after talks in Pakistan ended without a deal. Downing Street said Starmer, in a conversation with the Sultan of Oman, stressed that a continuation of the ceasefire is “vital” and that all parties must avoid further escalation. Health Secretary Wes Streeting called the failed talks “disappointing” and defended Britain’s decision not to join the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 英国首相基尔·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）敦促伊朗和美国在巴基斯坦的谈判无果而终后“找到出路”。唐宁街表示，斯塔默在与阿曼苏丹的谈话中强调，停火的延续是“至关重要的”，所有各方必须避免进一步升级。卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷（Wes Streeting）称谈判失败“令人失望”，并为英国不加入冲突的决定进行了辩护。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Two U.S. warships entered the Strait of Hormuz yesterday but turned back after an Iranian drone appeared overhead. This was reported by The New York Times, citing sources familiar with the operation. The ships were expected to demonstrate that the passage was secure—potentially the first step toward a mine-clearing mission. Instead, they withdrew after an Iranian reconnaissance drone showed up. The drone was reportedly shot down. According to sources, the two U.S. Navy vessels moved out of the Gulf of Oman, entered the strait, and then reversed course. While U.S. officials said the drone posed no direct threat, the Navy chose not to proceed under active Iranian surveillance. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 两艘美国军舰昨天进入霍尔木兹海峡，但在伊朗无人机出现在头顶后折返。据《纽约时报》援引熟悉该行动的消息人士报道。这些船只本应展示该通道是安全的——这可能是扫雷任务的第一步。然而，在伊朗侦察无人机出现后，他们撤退了。据报道，该无人机被击落。据消息人士称，两艘美国海军舰艇驶出阿曼湾，进入海峡，然后调转航向。虽然美国官员称无人机没有构成直接威胁，但海军选择不在伊朗的积极监视下继续前进。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Tucker Carlson: I don’t think Keir Starmer makes any calls about anything. Keir Starmer is as enslaved as Donald Trump is.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：我不认为基尔·斯塔默能对任何事情做主。基尔·斯塔默和唐纳德·特朗普一样，都是奴隶。

text: Tucker Carlson: The single biggest mistake Trump, or any American president has made in my lifetime, is going to war with Iran to change the regime.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：特朗普或我一生中任何一位美国总统犯下的最大错误，就是为了政权更迭而与伊朗开战。

text: Open Source Intel We patiently await President Trumps Truth Social post. Coming soon tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我们耐心地等待特朗普总统的“真实社交”（Truth Social）帖子。即将发布 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 IDF Chief of Staff orders immediate readiness for a possible return to war with Iran as talks collapse. Forces shift to pre operation alert posture, with intelligence accelerating target development. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043291173226213448/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 以色列国防军参谋长下令立即为可能重返与伊朗的战争做好准备，因为谈判破裂。部队转入行动前戒备状态，情报部门正在加速目标开发。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043291173226213448/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CBS: All members of the U.S. negotiating team, including envoys Witkoff and Kushner, have departed Islamabad. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel CBS：美国谈判团队的所有成员，包括特使威特科夫和库什纳，均已离开伊斯兰堡。推文

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 IDF has located a a three-story bomb laboratory in the Palestinian town of Tulkarm, in Judea and Samaria. Footage of the destruction 👇🏻 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043290033914823109/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 观看 🔴 以色列国防军在朱迪亚和撒马利亚的巴勒斯坦城镇图勒凯尔姆（Tulkarm）发现了一个三层楼的炸弹实验室。摧毁过程录像 👇🏻 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043290033914823109/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 Turkey is seeking up to 4,596 years in prison for Benjamin Netanyahu. ▪️ Ankara has filed charges against the Israeli prime minister and 35 other officials over the detention of the Sumud flotilla, which was heading to Gaza with humanitarian aid in October 2025. ▪️ Istanbul’s Chief Prosecutor’s Office accuses them of participating in a military operation against civilians in international waters and is requesting sentences of up to 4,596 years for each defendant. ▪️ The charges include crimes against humanity, genocide, and torture. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其寻求对本雅明·内塔尼亚胡判处最高4596年监禁。▪️ 安卡拉已对这位以色列总理和其他35名官员提起诉讼，原因是他们扣押了2025年10月载着人道主义援助物资前往加沙的“萨穆德”（Sumud）船队。▪️ 伊斯坦布尔首席检察官办公室指控他们参与了针对国际水域平民的军事行动，并要求对每名被告判处最高4596年的刑期。▪️ 指控包括危害人类罪、种族灭绝罪和酷刑罪。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 U.S. strategic bombers B-1B Lancer and B-52H Stratofortress, loaded with 1-ton JDAM-31 BLU-109 bombs, are deployed at RAF Fairford in the United Kingdom and are reportedly ready for potential strikes on Iran at any moment. 💣 In addition, cargo aircraft carrying munitions continue to arrive at the base without interruption. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 装载1吨重JDAM-31 BLU-109炸弹的美国B-1B“枪骑兵”和B-52H“同温层堡垒”战略轰炸机已部署在英国费尔福德皇家空军基地，据报道随时准备对伊朗进行潜在打击。💣 此外，运载弹药的货机继续不间断地抵达该基地。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s internet blackout has now entered day 44, marking the longest nationwide shutdown ever recorded. ⌛️ Network data show #Iran's internet blackout is now in its 44th day, continuing in its seventh week past the 1032 hour mark. The human and economic impacts of the extended censorship measure continue to pile up, breaking global records for shutdowns in a connected society. https://twitter.com/netblocks/status/2043231585269408086/photo/1 - NetBlocks tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗的互联网封锁现已进入第44天，创下了有记录以来最长的全国性停机时间。⌛️ 网络数据显示，#伊朗 的互联网封锁现已进入第44天，持续到第七周，超过了1032小时大关。这种长期审查措施带来的人力和经济影响不断累积，打破了互联社会停机的全球记录。 https://twitter.com/netblocks/status/2043231585269408086/photo/1 - NetBlocks 推文

text: Open Source Intel British Government: “The British Prime Minister and the Sultan of Oman affirm the importance of continuing the truce between Washington and Tehran despite the failure of the talks” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043286671207080193/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国政府：“英国首相和阿曼苏丹确认，尽管谈判失败，但华盛顿和德黑兰之间继续停火的重要性” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043286671207080193/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇸🇪 Sweden’s coast guard has detained the Panamanian bulk carrier Hui Yuan near Ystad after Swedish aviation observed the vessel washing coal residues into the sea, according to SVT. ▪️ The ship was en route from Russia to Las Palmas and has now been redirected to the Swedish coast. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇸🇪 据SVT报道，瑞典海岸警卫队在瑞典航空观察到巴拿马籍散货船“辉源”号（Hui Yuan）将煤炭残渣排入大海后，在于斯塔德（Ystad）附近扣押了该船。▪️ 该船原定从俄罗斯前往拉斯帕尔马斯，现已被改道至瑞典海岸。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Former Vice President Kamala Harris says President Trump tries to act like a “mob boss” Her impersonation of Trump is very entertaining. Footage via @FoxNews https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043286130569711864/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 前副总统卡玛拉·哈里斯（Kamala Harris）说特朗普总统试图表现得像个“黑帮老大”。她对特朗普的模仿非常有趣。录像来自 @FoxNews https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043286130569711864/video/1 推文

text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: I feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves. He is not free in this moment. Trump announced a ceasefire with relief, and then the ceasefire ended in 2 hours because Israel intentionally violated the terms by attacking Beirut.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：我为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样。他此刻并不自由。特朗普如释重负地宣布了停火，但停火在2小时后结束，因为以色列故意通过攻击贝鲁特违反了条款。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Following the collapse of US‑Iran talks, the Israeli Chief of Staff has placed the Israeli military on immediate readiness for a return to war with Iran. The Intelligence Directorate is accelerating target building. No decision on military action has been made yet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在美伊谈判破裂后，以色列参谋长已使以色列军队进入即时戒备状态，准备重返与伊朗的战争。情报局正在加速目标构建。目前尚未做出军事行动的决定。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Ahead of Tuesday’s talks between Israeli and Lebanese representatives, the Maronite Patriarch, Beshara Boutros al‑Rai, called for peace in his Easter sermon. “Enough wars, enough attacks, enough turning Lebanon into an arena for settling scores,” he said. “Peace is not imposed by violence or force, but built through dialogue and negotiation. Peace is not born from victory, but from a true will that respects human life and preserves dignity.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在周二以色列和黎巴嫩代表会谈之前，马龙派宗主教贝沙拉·布特罗斯·拉伊（Beshara Boutros al-Rai）在复活节布道中呼吁和平。“战争够了，袭击够了，把黎巴嫩变成结算账目的竞技场够了，”他说。“和平不是靠暴力或武力强加的，而是通过对话和谈判建立的。和平不是诞生于胜利，而是诞生于尊重生命和维护尊严的真正意愿。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed : Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki. His State of Law bloc boycotted the presidential vote alongside the Kurdistan Democratic Party. The constitution allows 15 days to name a prime minister. Some factions are pushing for a second term for the incumbent Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani. Maliki’s chances are weakening; a new candidate may be chosen by majority vote even if he boycotts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed：在尼扎尔·阿米迪（Nizar Amidi）总统当选后，伊拉克的政治局势因总理职位陷入了新的危机。协调框架内部分歧严重，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基（Nouri al-Maliki）的势头日益高涨。他的“法治”集团与库尔德斯坦民主党一起抵制了总统投票。宪法允许15天时间提名总理。一些派系正在推动现任总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al-Sudani）连任。马利基的机会正在减弱；即使他抵制，也可能通过多数票选出新候选人。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar in a analysis piece argues that the United States cannot serve as a neutral mediator in the Lebanon‑Israel conflict because it is a direct party to the war – militarily, politically and financially supporting Israel. Historical examples including Camp David (1978), Oslo (1993) and the 2024 ceasefire mechanism show US‑led mediation has produced fragile, unbalanced arrangements that favour Israel. Accepting a biased mediator, the article concludes, does not end the war but transfers it to an uneven negotiating table, weakening the weaker party - in this case Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 《Al-Akhbar》在一篇分析文章中指出，美国不能在黎以冲突中充当公正的调解人，因为它是战争的直接参与方——在军事、政治和财政上支持以色列。包括戴维营协议（1978年）、奥斯陆协议（1993年）和2024年停火机制在内的历史案例表明，美国主导的调解产生了脆弱、不平衡的安排，偏袒以色列。文章总结称，接受一个有偏见的调解人并不能结束战争，而是将其转移到不平等的谈判桌上，削弱了较弱的一方——在本案中是黎巴嫩。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Channel 15 in Hebrew: The Chief of Staff has directed the Israeli army to an immediate state of alert in preparation for war with Iran. A decision on resuming the bombing has not yet been made.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 希伯来语第15频道：参谋长已指示以色列军队进入即时戒备状态，为与伊朗的战争做准备。目前尚未做出恢复轰炸的决定。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A Hamas delegation is holding talks in Cairo with Egyptian mediators and Nikolay Mladenov, the senior representative of the US‑backed Peace Council, to discuss the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire – including the disarmament of Hamas and the entry of a technocratic committee to govern the Strip. Hamas insists on halting Israeli violations first and has rejected Mladenov’s claims about aid volumes. The Peace Council has received less than $1 billion of the $17 billion pledged for Gaza, with only the U.S., UAE and Morocco contributing so far, hindering reconstruction. The national committee for Gaza remains stuck in Cairo with no real power and domestic legitimacy. Israel is sceptical that Hamas will agree to give up its weapons and has already started Exigency plans to reopen the Gaza front if talks do fail. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 哈马斯代表团正在开罗与埃及调解人和美国支持的和平委员会高级代表尼古拉·姆拉德诺夫（Nikolay Mladenov）进行会谈，讨论加沙停火的第二阶段——包括解除哈马斯的武装以及引入一个技术官僚委员会来管理加沙地带。哈马斯坚持首先停止以色列的违规行为，并拒绝了姆拉德诺夫关于援助规模的说法。和平委员会收到的170亿美元加沙承诺资金中不到10亿美元，目前只有美国、阿联酋和摩洛哥捐款，阻碍了重建。加沙国家委员会仍被困在开罗，没有真正的权力和国内合法性。以色列怀疑哈马斯是否会同意放弃武器，并已开始制定应急计划，如果谈判失败，将重新开放加沙战线。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Iran's internet shutdown has reached day 44, now the longest nationwide blackout ever recorded. Source: NetBlocks
text_zh: 伊朗的互联网封锁已进入第44天，现为有记录以来最长的全国性停机时间。来源：NetBlocks

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 Ynet : Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan threatened that Turkey could carry out a military intervention against Israel similar to its operations in Libya and Nagorno‑Karabakh. “Just as we entered Libya and Karabakh, we can enter Israel. There is no reason not to do it,” he said during a speech. Erdogan accused Israel of killing hundreds of innocent Lebanese during the ceasefire and called Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu “blinded by blood and hatred." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 Ynet：土耳其总统雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安威胁称，土耳其可能对以色列进行类似于其在利比亚和纳戈尔诺-卡拉巴赫行动的军事干预。“就像我们进入利比亚和卡拉巴赫一样，我们可以进入以色列。没有理由不这样做，”他在演讲中说。埃尔多安指责以色列在停火期间杀害了数百名无辜的黎巴嫩人，并称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“被鲜血和仇恨蒙蔽了双眼”。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CNN: U.S. Vice President JD Vance said no agreement was reached with Iran after 21 hours of marathon talks in Islamabad, with the US giving its “final and best offer." Iran’s lead negotiator, parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said the…" ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has restored its East‑West oil pipeline to full capacity after attacks last week that caused a loss of approximately 700,000 barrels per day. The 1,200‑kilometre pipeline bypasses the Strait of Hormuz. Pumping capacity has returned to about 7 million barrels per day, with Manifa field producing 300,000 barrels per day. Work continues to restore full production at the Khurais field. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: “⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CNN：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的马拉松式会谈后，与伊朗没有达成任何协议，美国给出了其‘最终且最好的提议’。伊朗首席谈判代表、议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf）表示……” ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯在发生导致每天损失约70万桶石油的袭击后，已将其东西向输油管道恢复至满负荷运转。这条1200公里的管道绕过了霍尔木兹海峡。输送能力已恢复至每天约700万桶，其中Manifa油田每天生产30万桶。恢复Khurais油田全面生产的工作仍在继续。 @wfwitness
